arts.ttl: Gary Lineker adds to confusion over Newcastle FA Cup goal as fans fume at decision
arts.sum: Joe Willock's equaliser for Newcastle in their FA Cup fourth round clash with Birmingham City sparked huge anger amid doubts the ball had actually crossed the line

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker explains Newcastle goal line technology confusion amid Alan Shearer verdict
arts.sum: He said: "We need to see if it's actually over the line or not, there is goal-line technology in the FA Cup but not at a League One side, it has been in other games that have been played. Just four minutes later, Newcastle were in front for the first time after Callum Wilson stabbed home after a scramble in the Birmingham box.

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely incredible' - Itawa rocket draws Birmingham level against Newcastle
arts.sum: An "absolutely incredible" strike from Tomoki Iwata brings the Birmingham level against Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson gives honest prediction of Arsenal's silverware chances this season after being 'destroyed' by Newcastle
arts.sum: Speaking following Arsenal's EFL Cup exit Merson questioned whether Mikel Arteta 's side will be able to add to their trophy cabinet this season.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy, Lampard, Howe - FA Cup goals by current bosses
arts.sum: Watch a collection of FA Cup goals scored by players turned managers who are taking charge of sides in the fourth round this weekend.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'learn' Alexander Isak asking price as Newcastle 'set valuation' ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly told that Newcastle United will not let star forward Alexander Isak leave St James' Park for anything under £125m.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City v Newcastle United: FA Cup fourth round – live
arts.sum: FA Cup updates, 5.45pm GMT kick-off at St Andrew’s Live scores | Live clockwatch | Leyton Orient 1-2 Man City 6 min Pope, who isn’t the best with his feet, sprays a pass straight out of play. 4 min Iwata’s pass is intercepted by Willock, who surges 50 yards down the left and curls a dangerous cross – or rather, what would have been a dangerous cross if there was a Newcastle player in the area. arts.sum: Eddie Howe’s Premier League side travel to the League One leaders

arts.ttl: How to watch Birmingham City vs Newcastle - TV channel, live steam and FA Cup kick-off time - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Birmingham City are in FA Cup action on Saturday evening when they take on Premier League side Newcastle United at St Andrew's @ Knighthead Park. Here, BirminghamMail takes a look at the TV info needed to be able to follow Birmingham City's clash with Newcastle in the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: How to watch Birmingham City vs Newcastle United - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Newcastle United play League One pace-setters Birmingham City on Saturday with the Magpies looking to avoid an FA Cup fourth round upset. The FA Cup fourth round tie between Birmingham City and Newcastle United will be held on Saturday, February 8.
